about.title: About GitGot
about.intro: GitGot is a curated collection of open-source project combinations for real-world use cases. Every solution is tested and verified. Feedback and suggestions are welcome.
about.mission_desc: There's a wealth of great creator content sharing practical open-source stacks, but it's scattered across platforms and hard to discover. GitGot aims to be the go-to aggregator — collecting, organizing, and categorizing solutions so you can find the best toolchain for any task in one place.
how_items: AI Applications: local LLMs, RAG, AI coding tools
Productivity Tools: automation, note-taking, dev tools
about.belief: Great solutions deserve to be discovered — great tools deserve to be combined.

footer.tagline: GitGot - Discover the Right GitHub Open Source Combinations
footer.about: GitGot curates open-source project combinations shared by creators online, helping you quickly find the best toolchain for your needs.
